title: Villager Self Defense
description: Enables villagers to equip armor and weapons to defend themselves against attackers.
body:
# Villager Self Defense
---
Villagers deserve to be self sufficient. And you deserve the right to protect the villagers you work with on a daily basis. 

## What this mod does
---
### Defense Mode & Allies
Once attacked, a villager will attack back and enter a fight to the death. If other villagers are nearby, they will defend one another, always taking on the nearest attacker.

### Gearing up
Villagers who have been traded with at least once gain access to a gear menu. Here, you can equip the villager with armor and melee weapons.
